email_subject: Sollicitatie — Sales Development Rep bij Buildhive
email_body:
Beste Fréderic,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de rol van Sales Development Rep bij Buildhive. Jouw zoektocht naar een eerste SDR die het outbound fundament bouwt, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ambitie om te groeien in een dynamische startup-omgeving.

Hoewel mijn achtergrond voornamelijk in digital marketing en webdevelopment ligt, heb ik via mijn werk bij Episto en eigen projecten geleerd hoe ik prospecten identificeer, content optimaliseer en resultaten meet. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig processen op te zetten en te verbeteren — precies wat jullie zoeken voor het opbouwen van het verkoopproces. Mijn technische kennis van SEO en data-analyse helpt me om snel inzicht te krijgen in marktsignalen en prospectgedrag.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met dagelijkse lessen). Ik ben leergierig, direct en niet bang om de eerste te zijn. De kans om door te groeien naar Account Executive en later het salesteam mee op te bouwen, motiveert me enorm.

Ik voeg mijn cv en motivatiebrief bij. Ik hoop jullie snel te ontmoeten!

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Fréderic,

I am very excited to apply for the Sales Development Rep role at Buildhive. Your search for a first SDR to build the outbound foundation perfectly matches my ambition to grow in a dynamic startup environment.

Although my background is mainly in digital marketing and web development, through my work at Episto and my own projects I have learned how to identify prospects, optimize content, and measure results. I am used to setting up and improving processes independently — exactly what you need for building the sales process. My technical knowledge of SEO and data analysis helps me quickly understand market signals and prospect behavior.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with daily lessons). I am eager to learn, direct, and not afraid to be the first. The opportunity to grow into an Account Executive and later help build the sales team motivates me greatly.

I attach my CV and cover letter. I hope to meet you soon!

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Fréderic,

Toen ik de vacature voor Sales Development Rep bij Buildhive las, voelde het alsof die speciaal voor mij geschreven was. Jullie zoeken iemand die het outbound fundament bouwt, doorgroeit naar Account Executive en later het salesteam mee opricht — dat is exact het traject dat ik wil afleggen.

Mijn ervaring is misschien niet klassiek sales, maar ik breng iets mee dat minstens zo waardevol is: een builder mindset. Bij Episto heb ik zelfstandig on-page SEO en contentstrategie opgezet voor meerdere klanten. Dat betekende prospecteren (wie heeft baat bij SEO?), campagnes opzetten (keyword-gedreven content), resultaten meten en bijsturen. Precies dezelfde cyclus als outbound sales, alleen met een andere insteek. Mijn eigen project mirook.com leerde me hoe ik een product van nul opbouw, optimaliseer en zichtbaar maak — zowel voor mensen als voor AI. Die technische bagage (SEO, GEO, data-analyse) geeft me een uniek voordeel om snel te begrijpen wat architecten en aannemers nodig hebben en hoe ik hen kan bereiken.

Jullie vragen om iemand die nieuwsgierig is naar bouw en architectuur. Ik heb diep respect voor het vak en ben gemotiveerd om de sector te leren kennen. Mijn Nederlands is B1, maar ik volg dagelijks les en verbeter snel. Ik communiceer vlot in het Engels en Turks.

Wat mij nog meer aanspreekt, is de directe toegang tot de founders en de kans om mee te schrijven aan het playbook. Ik ben eerlijk, coachable en niet bang om fouten te maken en ervan te leren. Ik wil groeien met Buildhive.

Ik hoop jullie binnenkort te ontmoeten om mijn motivatie verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok

--- English version ---

Dear Fréderic,

When I read the vacancy for Sales Development Rep at Buildhive, it felt like it was written for me. You are looking for someone to build the outbound foundation, grow into an Account Executive, and later help establish the sales team — that is exactly the path I want to take.

My experience may not be classic sales, but I bring something equally valuable: a builder mindset. At Episto, I independently set up on-page SEO and content strategy for multiple clients. That meant prospecting (who benefits from SEO?), running campaigns (keyword-driven content), measuring results, and adjusting. Exactly the same cycle as outbound sales, just with a different angle. My own project mirook.com taught me how to build a product from scratch, optimize it, and make it visible — both for people and for AI. That technical background (SEO, GEO, data analysis) gives me a unique advantage to quickly understand what architects and contractors need and how to reach them.

You ask for someone curious about construction and architecture. I deeply respect the craft and am motivated to learn the sector. My Dutch is B1, but I take daily lessons and improve quickly. I communicate fluently in English and Turkish.

What also appeals to me is the direct access to the founders and the chance to co-write the playbook. I am honest, coachable, and not afraid to make mistakes and learn from them. I want to grow with Buildhive.

I hope to meet you soon to further explain my motivation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Builder mindset: independently built and optimized mirook.com from scratch, applying SEO/GEO to drive visibility
- Self-starter in outbound-style tasks: prospect identification, campaign setup, and performance measurement at Episto
- Technical edge: SEO, structured data, and analytics skills to understand prospect behavior and market signals
- Eager to grow: B1 Dutch with daily lessons, fluent English, and a strong desire to learn the construction sector
- First-employee mentality: comfortable with ambiguity, direct communication, and building processes from zero
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a builder mindset and a technical foundation in SEO, GEO, and web development. At Episto, I independently run outbound-style campaigns: identifying prospects, creating keyword-targeted content, and measuring performance to improve organic visibility. On my own project (mirook.com), I built a site from scratch, applied structured data and entity optimization, and ran iterative audits to boost search visibility. I am comfortable with data analysis, content management, and social media coordination. I am eager to apply my analytical and self-starting skills to outbound sales, grow into an Account Executive role, and help build a sales team. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Outbound & prospecting: prospect identification, campaign setup, performance measurement, content-driven outreach
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
